title: aldama corumbensis
intro: Aldama corumbensis, also known as the Corumbensis Aldama, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Aldama corumbensis include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, and its potential to support the immune system. Aldama corumbensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in some traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
